action.reasoning: Observation: 3-epoch ConvNeXt is currently best (0.7256), while 10 epochs degraded; validation logs show early peak and variance. Analysis: before spending more training time, a low-cost inference improvement may help: horizontal-flip TTA is aligned with training augmentation and should be safe for CIFAR-like images. I will update predict.py to average original and flipped logits, support future checkpoint ensembles, and submit the existing best checkpoint to measure the gain without retraining.
action.command: mkdir -p tmp_pred && cp /data/val.pt tmp_pred/test.pt && python predict.py --data_path tmp_pred --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output tmp_pred/preds.json
